title: rivet stats --format json
description: Machine-readable output produced by `rivet stats --format json`.

total.description: Total artifacts in the scoped store (post-filter, post-baseline).

types.description: Per-artifact-type counts; keys are artifact-type names.

orphans.description: Artifact IDs with no incoming or outgoing links.

broken_links.description: Count of links whose target does not exist in the store.

errors.description: Diagnostic count, severity 'error'. Added in v0.4.1.

warnings.description: Diagnostic count, severity 'warning'. Added in v0.4.1.

infos.description: Diagnostic count, severity 'info'. Added in v0.4.1.
